failedAssertions.reason: CriticalAccountingAxesIT still proves concurrent sales-journal alias convergence through postSalesJournalWithRetry(), which uses Thread.sleep-based caller retries, so the no-sleep contention requirement is not yet satisfied.

Canonical write-path scans still find Thread.sleep-based fallback loops in NumberSequenceService, OrderNumberService, InvoiceNumberService, AccountingCoreEngineCore.sleepBriefly(), and the concurrent sales-journal proof helper.

appliedUpdates.description: Corrected commands.targeted-accounting-proof to use the existing InvoiceServiceTest instead of the nonexistent InvoiceNumberServiceTest.
Updated the accounting proof-pack guidance to reference InvoiceServiceTest as the invoice-side contention/reference proof.
